content.query:
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_file_formats WHERE name = 'SynapseDelimitedTextFormat') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT [SynapseDelimitedTextFormat] 
	WITH ( FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT ,
	       FORMAT_OPTIONS (
			 FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
			 FIRST_ROW = 11,
			 USE_TYPE_DEFAULT = FALSE
			))
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources WHERE name = 'synapsecontainer_bigstore456_dfs_core_windows_net') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE [synapsecontainer_bigstore456_dfs_core_windows_net] 
	WITH (
		LOCATION = 'abfss://synapsecontainer@bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net' 
	)
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.baT1 (
	[Match_Id] bigint,
	[Innings_Id] bigint,
	[Over_Id] bigint,
	[Ball_Id] bigint,
	[Team_Batting_Id] bigint,
	[Team_Bowling_Id] bigint,
	[Striker_Id] bigint,
	[Striker_Batting_Position] bigint,
	[Non_Striker_Id] bigint,
	[Bowler_Id] bigint,
	[Batsman_Scored] nvarchar(4000),
	[Extra_Type] nvarchar(4000),
	[Extra_Runs] bigint,
	[Player_dissimal_Id] bigint,
	[Dissimal_Type] nvarchar(4000),
	[Fielder_Id] bigint
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'Ball_by_Ball.csv',
	DATA_SOURCE = [synapsecontainer_bigstore456_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseDelimitedTextFormat]
	)
GO


SELECT TOP 100 * FROM dbo.baT1
GO

DROP EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.baT;
DROP EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.BALL;
DROP EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.ABC;
DROP EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.vin;
DROP EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.BallByBall;
